metrics.command_line: export PYTHON_EGG_CACHE=`pwd` &&   (macs2 callpeak   -t '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/277/inputs/dataset_badecd01-7b5e-4054-bb16-35a7d427254b.dat'  --name forward_and_reverse    --format BAMPE   --gsize '2913022398'      --SPMR     --call-summits  --keep-dup '1'  --d-min 20 --buffer-size 100000  --bdg  --qvalue '0.05'  --mfold '5' '50'  --bw '300'  2>&1 > macs2_stderr) && cp forward_and_reverse_peaks.xls '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/277/working/dataset_15947656-477e-4651-9662-2b1215776edf.dat'   && ( count=`ls -1 forward_and_reverse* 2>/dev/null | wc -l`; if [ $count != 0 ]; then mkdir '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/277/working/dataset_28f039cb-cb76-4f06-9e34-fae0ef7c59e2_files' && cp -r forward_and_reverse* '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/277/working/dataset_28f039cb-cb76-4f06-9e34-fae0ef7c59e2_files' && python '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/277/tool_files/dir2html.py' '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/277/working/dataset_28f039cb-cb76-4f06-9e34-fae0ef7c59e2_files' macs2_stderr > '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/277/working/dataset_28f039cb-cb76-4f06-9e34-fae0ef7c59e2.dat'; fi; ) && exit_code_for_galaxy=$? && cat macs2_stderr 2>&1 && (exit $exit_code_for_galaxy)
